description: Mock result that simulates a graph traversal over companies, events, and news nodes.

cypher_examples.name: company_event_relation
cypher_examples.cypher: MATCH (c:Company)-[r]->(e:Event) WHERE c.name CONTAINS $keyword RETURN c.name, type(r), e.name, e.event_date LIMIT 10;

cypher_examples.name: company_to_company_relation
cypher_examples.cypher: MATCH (a:Company)-[r]->(b:Company) WHERE a.name CONTAINS $keyword OR b.name CONTAINS $keyword RETURN a.name, type(r), b.name, r.description LIMIT 10;

relations.description: NVIDIA designs AI accelerators and is assumed to depend on TSMC advanced-node manufacturing capacity in this mock graph.
NVIDIA is connected to AI accelerator demand expansion through GPU and accelerator supply themes.
Samsung Electronics is connected to HBM competition and memory investment themes.
Apple is connected to on-device AI feature expansion in this mock graph.
TSMC is connected to advanced-node capacity planning and AI chip manufacturing demand.
